title: Oasis 2.0
description: Minecraft but in Venice, in Candyland, on the Moon - or wherever you want. Transform your game to any world or style in real time with some AI magic.
body:
![Oasis 2.0 Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17fe6390332c5f065094589d5c66690647885ea5.webp)
## Welcome to Oasis 2.0!
**Oasis 2.0** lets you transform your game into any style or world you can imagine, in real time.
Think of it as a texture pack, but infinite. Like custom maps, but with no limits. And way beyond that. It's the mother of all mods.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ycp3SmfA4_E" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

All you need to do is type `/oasis start` and enter a prompt - and you'll be instantly transported. Think: Minecraft in Venice, India, New York, or Paris. Explore the jungle or Antarctica. Travel to the Wild West or medieval times. Visit a candy land, the moon, a zombie apocalypse. Or shift styles - anime, pixel art, GTA, Call of Duty… whatever you can think of. Be more creative than us. It’s cool.

Behind the scenes, Oasis 2.0 runs on a real-time video-to-video model developed by a company called Decart, called MirageLSD. It transforms your Minecraft visuals live as you play. FPS may drop a bit, and resolution isn’t perfect - but hey, that just adds to the challenge.

![World Examples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84309dd63684c90e77d8bce652f75af0f38882f9_0.webp)

**Simple Instructions:**

1. Make sure you have an instance of Fabric with Minecraft v1.21.8
1. Download and install the mod
1. Launch Minecraft (yeah, shocking)
1. To activate the model, type:  
``` /oasis start```
1. Then, to change a worlds, just try: ```/oasis prompt <your style>```, for example:  
```/oasis prompt Venice in the summer ```
1. You can temporarily hide the effect by holding the `R` key, toggle it with `V`, or stop it entirely with:  
```/oasis stop```
1. Use the `[` and `]` keys to switch between some of our favorite preset prompts for inspiration
1. Have a lot of fun!!
1. Share with us your results and creations!!


----------
Note: We report the MC version / OS / CPU / GPU vendor to our servers to tailor your experience and debug errors.
